title: TUI /pay broadcasts payment request to all peers, not targeted recipient
description: tui/src/event.rs handle_slash 'pay': after creating the PaymentSession, the ClearMessage::Payment is sent via BroadcastParams (broadcast to all peers). The intent is to send a payment request to a specific peer (handle), but the relay will deliver it to every connected user, leaking the payment amount and intent to all room participants. The target peer_pub_id is stored in the session but not used to route the message. The correct send method for a targeted payment is WhisperParams (unicast), not BroadcastParams.
